	/* nova_ext_sim_central:contact v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function contact()
	{
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\AntiSpam')
			&& \nova_ext_sim_central\AntiSpam::shouldBlock()) {
			$this->_regions['flash_message'] = Location::view(
				'flash', $this->skin, 'main',
				\nova_ext_sim_central\AntiSpam::flashError()
			);
			unset($_POST['submit']);
		}

		parent::contact();
	}
	/* nova_ext_sim_central:contact END */

	/* nova_ext_sim_central:join_email v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	protected function _email($type, $data)
	{
		// Discord Sign-In: hand the GM join-application email to the suite
		// so it can add the applicant's linked Discord to the Basic Info
		// block. JoinEmail::send() returns null to decline (or on any
		// internal problem), in which case core sends as normal.
		if ($type === 'join_gm' && class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\JoinEmail')) {
			$sent = \nova_ext_sim_central\JoinEmail::send($data);
			if ($sent !== null) {
				return $sent;
			}
		}
		return parent::_email($type, $data);
	}
	/* nova_ext_sim_central:join_email END */

	/* nova_ext_sim_central:join v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function join()
	{
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\AntiSpam')
			&& \nova_ext_sim_central\AntiSpam::shouldBlock()) {
			$this->_regions['flash_message'] = Location::view(
				'flash', $this->skin, 'main',
				\nova_ext_sim_central\AntiSpam::flashError()
			);
			unset($_POST['submit']);
			$_POST['agree'] = 'agree';
		}

		parent::join();
	}
	/* nova_ext_sim_central:join END */
